---
title: "Skills"
---

<script type="text/javascript">
 function showhide(id) {
    var e = document.getElementById(id);
    e.style.display = (e.style.display == 'block') ? 'none' : 'block';
 }
</script>

<style>

a:link {color: black;}

</style>

## Data Science

* R and RStudio     
  Packages include:
  + tidyverse
    - ggplot 2 
    - dplyr
    - tidyr
    - readr
    - purr 
    - tibble
    - stringr
    - forcats
  + knitr
  + reticulate
  + lubridate
  + dygraphs
  + sf (simple features)
  + leaflet
  + devtools
  + downloader
  + pagedown
  + pacman
  + installer
  + blogdown
* Python     
  Libraries include:
  + Pandas
  + Matplotlib
  + Numpy
  + Plotly
* SQL 
  + Oracle
  + MySQL
* Tableau
* Spreadsheets
  + Excel 
  + Google Sheets
* Data Intuition and Insight 
* Statistics
  <!-- Topics including: -->
  <!-- + Numerical and Graphical Summaries -->
  <!-- + Measures of Spread -->
  <!-- + Normal Distribution and Z-scores -->
  <!-- + Probability   -->

## Computer Engineering

* Embedded Programming and Systems
  + C/C++ 
  + Python
  + Assembly
  + Register-level C 
  + Simulink
* Digital Systems
  + Verilog
  + VHDL
  + FPGA 
    - Artix 7
    - Kintex 7
    - PolarFire
  + Simulation
    - Verilog Test Bench
    - Logisim
* Embedded Operating Systems
  + ROS (Robot Operating System)
  + VxWorks
  + FreeRTOS 
  + Real-Time Linux
  + Embedded Linux
  + Raspbian OS
  + Windows IOT
* Internet of Things
  + Communications
  + Information
  + Fourier Series and Transform
  + Filters
* Circuit Analysis
  + LTspice Software
  + Transistors, Diodes, and Op-Amps
    - MOSFETS
    - BJT
  + Basic Circuits
    - Inductors
    - Capacitors 
    - Resistors
  + Methods and Techniques
    - Node
    - Mesh

## Web Development

* HTML
* CSS
* Javascript
<!-- * Node.JS -->
<!-- * Express.JS -->
<!-- * PHP -->
* R-based webpages
  + YAML and Rmd     
    Basic building blocks:
    - knitr (R package)
    - _site.yml
    - index.Rmd
  + TOML and Rmd     
    Basic building blocks:
    - blogdown (R package)
    - config.toml
    - index.Rmd
  
## Mathematics

* Functional Programming
  + MATLAB
  + Mathematica
  + Elisp
  + Erlang
  <!-- + Clojure -->
  + Python
* Discrete Math 
* Differential Calculus 
* Linear Algebra  

## General Programming

* C/C++ 
* Java - Android Studio
* Python 
  + Arcade Library 
  + Data Structures
  
## Operating Systems

* Linux
* Chrome OS
* Microsoft Windows
  + Office 365
  + Active Directory
* Command lines 
  + Bash
  + Batch
  <!-- + Powershell -->

## Industry Knowledge

* Technical Communication
* Human Relations
* Teaching 
* Research
  + Scientific 
  + Computational
  + Market 
  + Data Exploration
* Project Management
  + Agile
  + Scrum
  + Waterfall
* Git
  + Github
  + Bash
* Security  
  + Social Engineering
  + Cryptography
  + Data and Networks 
  + Authentication, Access and Accounts
  + Binary Analysis
